name: Haggle with a Merchant
description_success: With a charming smile and sharp wit, the team secures a great deal on supplies.
description_failure: The merchant sees them coming a mile away and scams them out of a few coins.

name: An Ancient, Void-Sealed Door
description_success: A character attuned to the void resonates with the seal, causing the ancient door to creak open, revealing untouched treasures.
description_failure: The door's strange energy repels the team. There is no way forward down this path.

name: Guidance of a Forest Spirit
description: A benevolent forest spirit appears, pleased with the team's respect for nature. It blesses their journey forward.

name: Caught in a Sticky Bog
description: A sudden misstep lands the team in a deep, sticky bog. Getting out was a struggle, and everyone feels sluggish.

name: Surprise Pop Quiz
description_success: Relying on their sharp minds, the team aces the surprise test with flying colors.
description_failure: The confusing questions leave the team flustered, and their grades suffer for it.

name: Arm Wrestle a Local Champion
description_success: The team's raw power surprises the local champion, winning them the pot and the crowd's respect.
description_failure: The champion slams their hand down in an instant. A humbling, but harmless, defeat.

name: High-Security Terminal
description_success: With an expert's touch, the team's tech specialist bypasses the firewall and downloads valuable data.
description_failure: The encryption is too strong. The terminal locks them out and silently alerts security.

name: Unexpected Good Press
description: A reporter catches the team doing a good deed! Their sudden local fame makes everything seem to go their way.

name: A Haunting Melody
description: A sad, ghostly melody echoes through the area, leaving the entire team with a feeling of deep dread.

name: Bake-Off Challenge
description_success: The team's exquisite dessert wins the hearts (and stomachs) of the judges.
description_failure: They confused the salt for sugar. The result is... inedible.

name: Dispel a Labyrinthine Illusion
description_success: Focusing their magical energy, the team shatters the illusion, revealing the true path forward.
description_failure: The illusion is too powerful, leading the team on a long and fruitless detour.

name: Squeeze Through a Narrow Vent
description_success: One of the team's agile members navigates the tight space with ease, unlocking the door from the other side.
description_failure: Nobody on the team is flexible or small enough to fit through the narrow opening.

name: A Roadside Shrine's Blessing
description: The team pauses to pay respects at a small shrine and feels a warm, protective energy envelop them.

name: Twisted Ankle on a Loose Stone
description: A clumsy misstep leads to a sprained ankle. The team has to slow down significantly.

name: Karaoke Showdown
description_success: The team's surprisingly passionate performance wins over the crowd!
description_failure: Their off-key singing clears the room in record time.

name: Discover a Hidden Waterfall
description_success: Following the sound of rushing water, the team discovers a pristine, hidden waterfall with a small chest behind it.
description_failure: The sound of water was just a leaky pipe from a nearby abandoned building.

name: Identify a Famous Painting
description_success: A team member with a gentle soul recognizes the artwork from a book, impressing the gallery owner.
description_failure: The team mistakes the priceless abstract art for a child's finger painting.

name: Impromptu Street Performance
description: An impromptu concert draws a massive, adoring crowd! The team's confidence soars.

name: Trigger a Mana-Draining Trap
description: A glowing rune on the floor erupts, leaving the team feeling magically exhausted.

name: Face a Territorial Wyvern
description_success: The team stands their ground, enduring the wyvern's assault until it deems them too tough to eat and flies away.
description_failure: The wyvern's fierce attacks force a hasty and painful retreat.

name: Win the Sandcastle Contest
description_success: The team's architectural marvel of a sandcastle easily takes first prize.
description_failure: A rogue wave (and a stray dog) completely destroys their creation just before judging.

name: Read an Eldritch Text Aloud
description_success: A team member with a connection to the arcane reads the text, which surprisingly reveals a hidden passage.
description_failure: Attempting to read the text gives everyone a splitting headache and accomplishes nothing.

name: Find High-Quality Climbing Gear
description: The team finds a cache of perfectly maintained climbing equipment left behind by a previous expedition.

name: Get Detention
description: The teacher catches the team goofing off. Their after-school plans are ruined.

name: Find a Lost Wallet
description_success: Against all odds, the team spots a wallet on the ground and returns it to a grateful owner, who gives them a reward.
description_failure: The team spends an hour looking for the wallet, only to find out it was in the owner's back pocket the whole time.

name: Intimidate an Informant
description_success: A menacing glare is all it takes for the informant to spill everything they know.
description_failure: The informant laughs in their face and walks away, unimpressed.

name: Sink a Three-Pointer
description_success: A sporty member of the team effortlessly sinks the basket, winning the game.
description_failure: An airball. A truly spectacular, embarrassing airball.

name: Discover an Energizing Spice
description: The team finds a rare, pungent spice. After adding it to their rations, everyone feels stronger.

name: Glimpse a Horrifying Truth
description: For a brief moment, the veil of reality thins, showing the team something not meant for mortal eyes. Their minds are shaken.

name: Fix a Broken-Down Bus
description_success: With surprising mechanical knowledge, the team gets the bus running again, earning the gratitude of the passengers.
description_failure: They manage to make the problem worse, and now the horn won't stop blaring.

name: Dispel a Town's Curse
description_success: By combining their magical might, the team shatters the ancient curse, bringing light back to the town.
description_failure: The curse proves too powerful, and the team is forced to retreat before they are consumed by it.

name: Banish a Vengeful Poltergeist
description_success: A member with spiritual authority performs a rite of pacification, allowing the spirit to finally rest.
description_failure: The team's attempts to communicate with the ghost only seem to make it angrier.

name: Tell a Hilarious Joke
description: One of the team members tells a joke so funny that it becomes the talk of the town, putting everyone in a good mood.

name: Massive Traffic Jam
description: The entire city is gridlocked. The expedition is significantly delayed.

name: Calm a Swarm of Angry Bees
description_success: With a gentle and calming presence, the team manages to pacify the swarm without anyone getting stung.
description_failure: Run! Just run!

name: Crack a Combination Safe
description_success: Listening closely to the tumblers, a lucky guess pops the safe open!
description_failure: After several failed attempts, the lock jams completely.

name: Pass a Military Checkpoint
description_success: The team's professional demeanor and knowledge of protocol allow them to pass without incident.
description_failure: The guards are suspicious and refuse to let the team pass.

name: Befriend a Wise Wolf
description: The team shares their food with a large, intelligent-looking wolf, who then guides them through the safest paths.

name: A Terrible Social Faux Pas
description: A misunderstanding leads to a huge romantic drama, making all future social interactions incredibly awkward.

name: Draw a Perfect Portrait
description_success: The resulting portrait is a masterpiece, and the subject pays handsomely for it.
description_failure: The drawing looks nothing like the subject, who is deeply offended.

name: Navigate a Fierce Blizzard
description_success: Huddling together for warmth and pushing through the biting wind, the team makes it to shelter.
description_failure: The whiteout conditions force the team to dig in and wait, losing precious time.

name: Purify a Corrupted Shrine
description_success: A member attuned to the light channels a powerful prayer, cleansing the shrine of its corruption.
description_failure: The dark energy is too strong and repels the team's efforts.

name: Find a Power Suit
description: The team stumbles upon an old but functional powered exoskeleton, boosting their physical abilities.

name: Caught in a Heatwave
description: The desert sun is relentless, leaving the team dehydrated and exhausted.

name: Annual Fitness Test
description_success: The team breezes through the fitness test, setting new school records.
description_failure: The team is completely out of breath after the first lap.

name: Escape a Giant Squid
description_success: With a burst of speed, the team manages to outmaneuver the creature's grasping tentacles.
description_failure: The squid grabs the team's supply raft, and they have to cut it loose to escape.

name: Tune a Priceless Stradivarius
description_success: A musician on the team carefully tunes the instrument, producing a perfect, beautiful sound.
description_failure: SNAP! A string breaks. The team makes a hasty exit.

name: Discover a Font of Magic
description: The team finds a spring of pure magical energy. Even non-mages feel its power.

name: Survive a Stampede
description_success: The team stands their ground, finding a sturdy rock to hide behind until the herd passes.
description_failure: The team is scattered by the panicked animals and spends hours regrouping.

name: Win a High-Stakes Poker Game
description_success: With an unreadable poker face and incredible luck, the team bluffs their way to a massive pot.
description_failure: Their opponents read them like a book and clean them out.

name: A Door Barred by Chivalry
description_success: A team member with a strong sense of honor is deemed worthy, and the path opens.
description_failure: The door's inscription declares the team unworthy to pass.

name: Find an Alchemist's Satchel
description: The team finds an abandoned satchel filled with strange but useful potions.

name: A Sudden Bout of Food Poisoning
description: Those suspicious-looking berries were a bad idea. The whole team feels weak.

name: Win the School Marathon
description_success: Pacing themselves perfectly, the team finishes first and earns a prize.
description_failure: They get a stitch in their side halfway through and have to walk the rest of the way.

name: An Audience with the Queen
description_success: The team's eloquent speech and proper etiquette impress the Queen, who bestows a gift upon them.
description_failure: The team commits a major social blunder and is politely but firmly escorted out.

name: A Door That Only Opens for the Unlucky
description_success: A character cursed with bad luck trips and falls against the door, which swings open unexpectedly.
description_failure: The team's competence and good fortune seem to be what's keeping the door sealed.

name: A Morale-Boosting Speech
description: One of the team members gives a rousing speech, inspiring everyone to push through the hardships ahead.

name: A Swarm of Blood-sucking Bats
description: The team is swarmed by bats, leaving them drained and weakened.

name: Decipher a Star Chart
description_success: The team's knowledge of the cosmos allows them to plot a course to a hidden location.
description_failure: The constellations are all wrong, and the team ends up more lost than before.

name: Outsmart a Sphinx's Riddle
description_success: The Sphinx is amused by the team's clever answer and allows them to pass with a reward.
description_failure: The Sphinx sighs at their incorrect answer and teleports them a mile back the way they came.

name: Soothing a Rampaging Beast
description_success: A kind-hearted team member calms the creature, which leads them to its hidden nest full of treasures.
description_failure: The beast is inconsolable and the team is forced to flee.

name: Find a Pair of Winged Boots
description: The team finds a pair of magical boots that makes them feel lighter than air for the rest of the journey.

name: Political Infighting
description: The team gets caught in the middle of a bureaucratic dispute, slowing all progress to a crawl.

name: Survive an Idol Audition
description_success: The team's raw charisma and talent impress the judges, and they pass to the next round.
description_failure: The team cracks under the pressure and is unceremoniously booed off stage.

name: Win a Demolition Derby
description_success: Through sheer aggression and surprisingly good driving, the team is the last car standing.
description_failure: Their car's engine gives out after the first collision.

name: An Unbelievably Comfy Couch
description_success: A true connoisseur of comfort recognizes the value of this couch and decides to take a short, rewarding nap.
description_failure: The team, focused on their mission, walks right past the greatest napping spot in the world.

name: A Stroke of Dumb Luck
description: A series of improbable, slapstick events somehow results in the team ending up exactly where they needed to be.

name: Paranoia-Inducing Spores
description: The team breathes in strange spores from a mushroom, making them suspicious and untrusting of each other.

name: Perform a Tea Ceremony
description_success: The team's graceful and precise movements result in a perfect, calming ceremony.
description_failure: They spill the hot tea everywhere, offending their host and scalding their hands.

name: Face the Guardian of the Abyss
description_success: The team withstands the guardian's mind-bending assault and finds the treasure it was protecting.
description_failure: The sight of the creature is too much to bear, and the team flees in terror.

name: A Challenge of Swords
description_success: A master sword-wielder on the team accepts the duel and wins, earning the respect and treasure of their opponent.
description_failure: No one on the team is skilled enough with a blade to accept the challenge.

name: Receive a Prophetic Vision
description: One of the team members has a sudden vision of the path ahead, revealing all its secrets.

name: A Sudden Magical Sickness
description: A strange magical ailment befalls the team, weakening their resolve and defenses.

name: Compose a Hit Song
description_success: In a moment of inspiration, the team writes a song that becomes an instant classic.
description_failure: The song is a cacophony of mismatched notes and terrible lyrics.

name: Navigate an Asteroid Field
description_success: With incredible piloting skills, the team weaves through the dangerous asteroids unscathed.
description_failure: A stray asteroid clips their ship, forcing them to stop for emergency repairs.

name: A Complicated Tax Form
description_success: An expert in worldly matters helps the team navigate the bureaucratic nightmare, earning a tidy refund.
description_failure: The team gives up and just pays the fine.

name: Local Holiday
description: The team arrives in a town during a local holiday. The cheerful atmosphere lifts everyone's spirits.

name: A Rival's Sabotage
description: A rival team has sabotaged their gear! Everything seems just a little bit harder now.

name: A Game of Tag
description_success: The team's agility and speed make them impossible to catch.
description_failure: They are tagged almost immediately.

name: Repair a Town's Clocktower
description_success: The team's intricate work gets the ancient clock ticking again, earning them a reward from the mayor.
description_failure: They accidentally make the clock run backward.

name: A Test of Faith
description_success: A member of the team with unwavering faith is granted a divine boon.
description_failure: The divine presence does not respond to the team's prayers.

name: Find a Well-Stocked Pantry
description: The team discovers an abandoned cabin with a pantry full of delicious, preserved food.

name: A Sudden Change in Leadership
description: An argument breaks out, and the team's cohesion is shattered for a while.

name: Endure a Comedy Routine
description_success: The team somehow manages to sit through the entire terrible comedy show without heckling.
description_failure: They get kicked out for laughing at the wrong time.

name: Wrangle Escaped Livestock
description_success: The team successfully herds all the animals back into their pen.
description_failure: The animals outsmart them at every turn, leading to a chaotic mess.

name: The Sentient Door
description_success: A member known for their chaotic energy somehow says the exact nonsensical thing the door wanted to hear.
description_failure: The door is offended by the team's logic and refuses to open.

name: An Inspiring Sunset
description: The team takes a moment to watch a breathtakingly beautiful sunset, renewing their spirits for the journey ahead.

name: A Rival's Taunts
description: The team runs into a rival group who mock their efforts, shaking their confidence.

name: Cross a Chasm on a Rope Bridge
description_success: With steady hands and feet, the entire team makes it across the rickety bridge.
description_failure: A strong gust of wind nearly sends a team member plummeting, forcing them to turn back.

name: Tame a Wild Griffin
description_success: The team manages to calm the majestic beast, earning its trust and a feather from its wing.
description_failure: The griffin is unimpressed and chases them out of its territory.

name: Recite an Ancient Poem
description_success: A bookish team member recognizes the poem from their studies, revealing a hidden mechanism.
description_failure: The team's butchering of the poem seems to make the ancient stones angry.

name: Find a Map of the Area
description: The team finds a surprisingly accurate map, making all future navigation checks much easier.

name: False Rumors Spread
description: Someone spreads a nasty rumor about the team, causing locals to be uncooperative.

name: Build a Raft to Cross a River
description_success: The team constructs a sturdy, seaworthy raft and crosses the river with ease.
description_failure: The raft falls apart halfway across the river, and they have to swim for it, losing some supplies.

name: Survive a Kaiju Attack
description_success: Through clever diversions and sheer grit, the team survives the monster's rampage and finds valuables in the wreckage.
description_failure: The team is caught in the path of destruction and barely escapes with their lives.

name: A Door Locked by Sadness
description_success: A team member with a deep understanding of melancholy offers a word of comfort, and the door opens.
description_failure: The team's cheerful demeanor has no effect on the sorrowful lock.

name: Win a Staring Contest
description_success: The team's unwavering gaze proves too much for their opponent, who blinks and concedes defeat.
description_failure: An errant sneeze leads to an immediate and disqualifying blink.

name: Calm an Angry God
description_success: Through offerings and heartfelt prayers, the team soothes the deity's wrath, receiving a divine blessing.
description_failure: The deity is unimpressed by their offerings and strikes the ground with a bolt of lightning, forcing them away.

name: An Extremely Spicy Food Challenge
description_success: A character with a fiery spirit devours the spicy meal without breaking a sweat, winning the grand prize.
description_failure: The spice is too much to handle, resulting in a frantic search for milk and a forfeit.

name: Find a Four-Leaf Clover
description: While resting in a meadow, the team stumbles upon a patch of incredibly lucky four-leaf clovers.

name: A Sudden Whiteout
description: A fierce blizzard suddenly engulfs the area, making it impossible to see. The team gets hopelessly lost.

name: Perform Kabuki Theater
description_success: The team's dramatic performance captivates the audience, earning them a standing ovation and a bag of coins.
description_failure: The team forgets their lines and ends up improvising a terrible comedy routine instead.

name: Win a Mecha Duel
description_success: Using superior tactics and piloting skill, the team's mecha emerges victorious from the arena.
description_failure: The opponent's mecha is too fast and powerful, leaving the team's machine in a heap of scrap.

name: A Door Sealed by Melancholy
description_success: A quiet, introverted member of the team understands the door's sorrow and it opens for them.
description_failure: The team's boisterous energy is the complete opposite of what's needed to open this door.

name: Receive a Royal Pardon
description: After a case of mistaken identity, the local authorities apologize and grant the team diplomatic immunity for the rest of their journey.

name: A Sudden Downpour
description: A torrential rainstorm soaks the team and their supplies, making everything heavy and uncomfortable.

name: Survive a Class Trial
description_success: By pointing out the contradictions, the team successfully identifies the culprit and restores order.
description_failure: The team accuses the wrong person, leading to chaos and a loss of trust.

name: Outrun a Lava Flow
description_success: The team runs for their lives, narrowly escaping the flow of molten rock.
description_failure: They are cornered by the lava and have to abandon some of their heavier gear to escape.

name: An Otaku's Trivia Challenge
description_success: A true otaku on the team answers every obscure question correctly, winning the grand prize.
description_failure: The team's lack of knowledge about 90s mecha anime is painfully obvious.

name: Find a Lucky Charm
description: The team finds a small, ornate charm that seems to radiate good fortune.

name: Equipment Rusts in the Damp Air
description: The constant humidity has caused the team's metal equipment to rust, making it less effective.

name: Perform a Stand-Up Comedy Routine
description_success: The audience is in stitches! The club owner pays them handsomely for the performance.
description_failure: Crickets. The only sound is the awkward chirping of crickets.

name: Survive a Political Coup
description_success: By staying hidden and making smart choices, the team avoids the conflict and manages to loot some abandoned caches amidst the chaos.
description_failure: The team gets caught in the crossfire and is lucky to escape with their lives.

name: A Path Blocked by Thorns
description_success: A character with a fiery disposition simply burns the thorns away, clearing the path.
description_failure: The thorns are too thick and sharp to cut through by hand.

name: Local Acclaim
description: The team becomes local heroes after a good deed. Everyone is now incredibly helpful.

name: An Unsettling Prophecy
description: A fortune teller gives the team a dire prophecy, filling them with a sense of inescapable doom.

name: Repair a Leaky Roof
description_success: The team patches the roof perfectly just before a major downpour, earning a hefty reward.
description_failure: Their 'repair' only makes the leak worse, and they have to pay for the damages.

name: Impress a Dragon
description_success: The dragon is amused by the team's bravado and intelligence, and offers them a piece of its hoard as a sign of respect.
description_failure: The dragon considers them pests and blasts them with a gout of flame, forcing a retreat.

name: An Idol Group's Dance-Off
description_success: A natural-born idol on the team leads them in a perfectly synchronized performance, winning the dance-off.
description_failure: The team's complete lack of rhythm is painfully obvious.

name: Find a Protective Amulet
description: The team discovers an amulet that wards off evil spirits and negative energy.

name: Blinding Sandstorm
description: A sudden sandstorm reduces visibility to zero, making it impossible to navigate effectively.

name: A Game of Chicken
description_success: The team's unwavering bravery forces their opponent to swerve at the last second.
description_failure: The team wisely decides this is a stupid game and chickens out.

name: Hack the Planet
description_success: The team successfully breaches the global network, finding the data they were looking for.
description_failure: They trigger every alarm imaginable and have to wipe their tracks and run.

name: A Challenge from the Kendo Club
description_success: The team's resident sword expert accepts the challenge and wins with ease.
description_failure: The team is no match for the Kendo captain's skill.

name: Find a Fountain of Youth
description: The team drinks from a magical spring, feeling rejuvenated and full of life.

name: Betrayed!
description: A trusted contact betrays the team, stealing some of their hard-earned loot.

name: Perform a Magical Light Show
description_success: The team creates a dazzling display of magical lights and illusions, earning a shower of coins from the amazed crowd.
description_failure: The spell fizzles, creating a puff of smelly green smoke.

name: Write a Best-Selling Light Novel
description_success: The team's story of their adventures becomes an instant hit, and the royalties pour in.
description_failure: Their manuscript is rejected by every publisher in town.

name: An Extremely Heavy Door
description_success: A physically powerful team member manages to heave the stone door open.
description_failure: The door doesn't budge an inch.

name: A Stroke of Genius
description: One of the team members has a brilliant idea, making all future intellectual challenges seem trivial.

name: A Series of Unfortunate Events
description: Everything that can go wrong, does go wrong. It's almost comical how unlucky the team is.

name: Survive a High School Festival
description_success: The team navigates the crowded festival with ease, enjoying the food and games.
description_failure: They get roped into helping the student council and spend the whole day doing paperwork.

name: A Heist at the Art Museum
description_success: The team bypasses security, grabs the artifact, and slips out unnoticed.
description_failure: They trip an alarm on the way in and have to flee empty-handed.

name: A Door That Only Opens to a Song
description_success: The team's resident musician sings the ancient melody, and the door swings open.
description_failure: The door seems to actively dislike their singing voices.

name: Find a Suit of Power Armor
description: The team discovers a fully-functional suit of power armor, making them feel invincible.

name: Mechanical Failure
description: A critical piece of equipment breaks down, hindering the team's technological capabilities.

name: A Game of Dodgeball
description_success: The team's superior agility and throwing power lead them to a swift victory.
description_failure: They are all eliminated in the first 30 seconds.

name: Navigate an Escher-esque Maze
description_success: By ignoring conventional logic, the team finds the impossible path through the maze.
description_failure: The team walks up a staircase for three hours only to end up back where they started.

name: A Door That Only Opens for Royalty
description_success: A member of the team with a regal bearing commands the door to open, and it obeys.
description_failure: The door does not recognize the team's authority.

name: Find a Holy Spring
description: The team bathes in a sacred spring, cleansing them of all negative energy and ailments.

name: Caught in a Time Warp
description: The team gets stuck in a localized time loop, forcing them to repeat the same few minutes over and over.

name: Survive a Tsundere's Outburst
description_success: The team successfully navigates the conversation without getting hit. It's not like they were happy about it or anything, b-baka!
description_failure: They said the wrong thing and got a book thrown at their head.

name: Battle in the Colosseum
description_success: The team emerges as the champions of the grand tournament, earning fame and fortune.
description_failure: The team is defeated in the first round by a surprisingly strong gladiator.

name: Win a Hot Dog Eating Contest
description_success: The team's impressive appetite leaves the competition in the dust.
description_failure: They hit a wall after the fifth hot dog and have to bow out gracefully.

name: Navigate an Ancient Tomb
description_success: By carefully avoiding traps and deciphering warnings, the team reaches the central burial chamber.
description_failure: They trigger a pressure plate and have to outrun a giant rolling boulder.

name: The Sentient Waterfall
description_success: A character with an affinity for water convinces the waterfall spirit to part, revealing a hidden cave.
description_failure: The waterfall spirit is in a bad mood and refuses to let them pass.

name: Find a Lucky Cat Statue
description: The team finds a Maneki-neko statue that seems to bring them good fortune in their social encounters.

name: A Sudden Loss of Confidence
description: After a series of minor setbacks, the team's morale plummets, making them second-guess every decision.

name: Ace a History Exam
description_success: The team's diligent studying pays off, and they all get perfect scores.
description_failure: They studied the wrong chapter and have to guess on most of the questions.

name: Survive a Kaiju Movie Marathon
description_success: The team endures the entire marathon, from the black-and-white classics to the CGI-heavy sequels.
description_failure: They fall asleep during the third movie and miss the grand finale.

name: The Hacker's Gauntlet
description_success: A true genius of technology on the team effortlessly bypasses every layer of security.
description_failure: The first firewall is too strong, and their intrusion is immediately detected.

name: A Bard Sings of Their Deeds
description: A traveling bard hears of the team's exploits and composes an epic song, boosting their reputation.

name: A Sudden Gust of Wind
description: A powerful gust of wind blows away some of the team's lighter supplies.

name: Perform in the School Play
description_success: The team's performance is a smash hit, earning them rave reviews in the school paper.
description_failure: Massive stage fright leads to a series of forgotten lines and missed cues.

name: Face a Corrupted Archangel
description_success: The team withstands the holy and unholy power, managing to purify the archangel's spirit.
description_failure: The overwhelming power of the corrupted angel forces the team to flee for their lives.

name: A Door That Only Opens for the Lazy
description_success: A character who would rather be napping leans against the door, which swings open from the minimal effort.
description_failure: The team's gung-ho, energetic attitude is the exact opposite of what this door wants.

name: Find a Suit of Plot Armor
description: The team finds a strange, shimmering suit of armor that seems to make failure an impossibility.

name: Amnesia Gas
description: The team accidentally triggers a trap that releases a gas, making them forget their mission objectives for a while.

name: Win a Game of Mahjong
description_success: A surprising display of strategy and luck leads to a spectacular win.
description_failure: The team is completely lost by the complex rules and loses badly.

name: Navigate a Time-Space Distortion
description_success: By holding onto a single, clear thought, the team navigates the chaotic dimension and emerges on the other side.
description_failure: The disorienting journey through time and space leaves the team scattered and confused.

name: The Path of Thorns
description_success: A character with a tough hide and tougher spirit pushes through the thorns, clearing the way for the others.
description_failure: The thorns are too dense and painful to pass.

name: Find a Bottomless Canteen
description: The team discovers a magical canteen that never runs out of fresh, cool water.

name: A Sudden Downpour of Frogs
description: It starts raining frogs. No one knows why. It's very distracting.

name: Calm Down an Angry Landlord
description_success: The team's sincere apologies and quick thinking manage to placate the furious landlord.
description_failure: Their excuses only make the landlord angrier, and they are fined.

name: A Duel Atop a Speeding Train
description_success: The team keeps their footing and successfully defeats their opponent as the landscape rushes by.
description_failure: The team loses their balance and has to cling on for dear life, allowing the opponent to escape.

name: A Challenge of Pure Cuteness
description_success: A member of the team is so overwhelmingly cute that the guards are too flustered to stop them.
description_failure: The guards are immune to their charms.

name: A Fortuitous Tailwind
description: A strong, steady wind blows at the team's backs, speeding up their journey.

name: The Air Grows Heavy
description: A strange magical pressure fills the air, making it difficult to move and think.

name: Sneak Past a Sleeping Dragon
description_success: Moving with absolute silence, the team manages to sneak past the beast and raid its hoard.
description_failure: A single misplaced step causes a loud clatter, waking the dragon and forcing a hasty retreat.

name: Survive an Idol Concert
description_success: The team navigates the passionate crowd and enjoys the show, even catching a signed towel.
description_failure: They get lost in the sea of fans and emerge hours later, exhausted and deafened.

name: A Door Only a Shut-In Would Love
description_success: A character who understands the appeal of staying indoors forever knows the secret password.
description_failure: The door detects the team's 'can-do' attitude and refuses to open.

name: Gain a Mysterious Sponsor
description: An anonymous benefactor takes an interest in the team's journey, providing them with a wealth of supplies.

name: The Path Crumbles
description: The path ahead collapses, forcing the team to take a long and dangerous detour.

name: A Game of Chicken... With a Train
description_success: With nerves of steel, the team leaps out of the way at the last possible second, impressing the local delinquents.
description_failure: The team wisely decides this is a terrible idea and leaves.

name: Confront the Goddess of Chaos
description_success: The team manages to survive the goddess's whimsical and reality-bending trials, earning her favor.
description_failure: The goddess grows bored with them and teleports them to a random, inconvenient location.

name: An Unstable Chemical Concoction
description_success: A team member with a scientific mind correctly identifies the chemicals and neutralizes them, revealing a hidden compartment.
description_failure: They mix the wrong chemicals, causing a small, harmless, but very smelly explosion.

name: A Favor from the Shadows
description: An unseen ally leaves a cache of supplies and a map detailing all nearby traps.

name: Haunted by a Past Failure
description: A memory of a past mistake resurfaces, filling the team with doubt and hesitation.

name: Participate in a Shogi Match
description_success: The team's clever strategy leads to a surprising checkmate.
description_failure: They lose their king in five moves.

name: Survive a Magical Girl Transformation Sequence
description_success: The team patiently waits through the entire, five-minute-long transformation sequence and gets the drop on their opponent.
description_failure: They get bored and wander off halfway through.

name: An Audience with the Student Council President
description_success: A fellow member of the student council on the team smooths things over, gaining access to the archives.
description_failure: The student council president declares their request 'disorderly' and denies them.

name: Gain a Combat Pet
description: The team befriends a loyal and powerful beast that helps them in physical challenges.

name: Torrential Rain
description: The heavens open up, turning the path into a muddy river and making all fire-based abilities useless.

name: Find the Missing Page of a Manga
description_success: After a thorough search, the team finds the missing page, completing the story and earning a small reward.
description_failure: The page is nowhere to be found, leaving the story forever unfinished.

name: Navigate a Bureaucratic Nightmare
description_success: With immense patience and mental fortitude, the team successfully files Form 27B/6.
description_failure: They filled out the wrong form. They now have to start the entire process over.

name: A Lock That Requires Two People to Open
description_success: The team has enough members to operate the strange mechanism simultaneously.
description_failure: The team lacks the manpower to operate the lock.

name: Find a Suit of Powered Armor
description: The team discovers an abandoned but functional suit of powered armor, making them feel invincible.

name: A Crisis of Faith
description: A dark encounter shakes the team's belief in the divine, weakening their holy powers.

name: A High-Speed Chase
description_success: Through skillful driving and clever shortcuts, the team catches their target.
description_failure: The target gives them the slip in a crowded intersection.

name: Confront the God of a Forgotten Realm
description_success: The team manages to appease the ancient god, who rewards them with a fraction of its cosmic power.
description_failure: The god is angered by their intrusion and banishes them from its realm.

name: Win a Game of Tag on a Volcano
description_success: The team's agility and fearlessness allow them to deftly leap over lava flows and tag their opponent.
description_failure: The team wisely decides that playing tag on an active volcano is a bad idea and forfeits.

name: Calm a Crying Child
description_success: With a gentle voice and a kind heart, the team soothes the lost child, who then shows them a secret path.
description_failure: Their attempts to help only make the child cry louder, attracting unwanted attention.

name: A Door Sealed with a Tsundere's Lock
description_success: A character who understands the complex heart of a tsundere says 'It's not like I want you to open or anything... baka!' and the door swings open.
description_failure: The door is immune to their straightforward requests.

name: Discover a Hidden Hot Spring
description: The team finds a hidden hot spring. A relaxing soak removes all their aches and pains.

name: A Sudden Gravity Well
description: The area is suddenly crushed by intense gravity, making every movement a struggle.

name: Survive a Student Council Meeting
description_success: The team navigates the political minefield of the meeting and gets their proposal approved.
description_failure: Their proposal is immediately shot down, and they are assigned extra cleanup duties for wasting everyone's time.

name: Win a Spaceship Dogfight
description_success: With expert piloting and precise shots, the team shoots down the enemy fighters.
description_failure: They are outmaneuvered and have to make an emergency FTL jump to escape.

name: A Door That Only Opens for the Rich
description_success: A wealthy team member simply bribes the guard, who gladly opens the door.
description_failure: The team lacks the funds to even be considered for entry.

name: A Prophetic Dream
description: One of the team members has a dream that reveals the solution to the next major obstacle.

name: A Sudden Case of Amnesia
description: A strange magical fog rolls in. When it clears, the team can't remember why they're on this expedition.

name: Run a Food Stall at a Festival
description_success: Their food is a massive hit, and they sell out in hours, making a huge profit.
description_failure: No one wants to try their experimental 'Squid Ink and Mayo Takoyaki.'

name: A Duel with a Vampire Lord
description_success: The team exploits the vampire's weaknesses and manages to drive it back into its coffin.
description_failure: The vampire's overwhelming power and regeneration are too much to handle.

name: A Path Blocked by a sleeping Snorlax... I mean, a large sleepy creature
description_success: A character with a musical talent plays a lullaby, causing the creature to roll over in its sleep, clearing the path.
description_failure: They try to poke it with a stick. This was a bad idea.

name: Find a Legendary Blacksmith's Hammer
description: The team finds a mythical hammer that can repair and improve any equipment.

name: A Rival Spreads Misinformation
description: A rival team sends them on a wild goose chase with a fake map.

name: Infiltrate a Secret Society Meeting
description_success: The team blends in perfectly, gathering crucial intelligence without raising suspicion.
description_failure: They immediately get the secret password wrong and are thrown out.

name: Survive a Magical Girl Team-Up Attack
description_success: The team braces for impact and manages to withstand the friendship-powered rainbow blast.
description_failure: The power of friendship is too strong, and the team is sent blasting off again.

name: A Computer that Requires a Sacrifice
description_success: A character who understands the dark arts offers a bit of their life force to power up the ancient machine.
description_failure: The machine's demands are too great for the team to meet.

name: Gain the Favor of the Wind
description: The team helps a trapped wind spirit, which now guides their steps and quickens their pace.

name: An Anti-Magic Field
description: The team wanders into a field that suppresses all magical energy, rendering their mages powerless.

name: A Poetry Slam
description_success: The team's heartfelt and surprisingly deep poetry earns snaps and applause from the audience.
description_failure: Their attempt at a haiku has six syllables in the first line. It's a disaster.

name: Survive a Sharknado
description_success: Against all logic, the team fights off the flying sharks and survives the tornado.
description_failure: It's a tornado full of sharks. They run. A lot.

name: A Door That Only Opens for the Main Character
description_success: A character with an absurd amount of plot armor touches the door and it opens, as if recognizing its protagonist.
description_failure: The door doesn't recognize any of the team as being important enough to the story.

name: Find an All-You-Can-Eat Buffet Coupon
description: The team finds a coupon for a buffet. After a massive meal, they feel incredibly tough and resilient.

name: A Sudden Identity Crisis
description: A profound philosophical question sends the team into an existential spiral, making it hard to focus.

name: Win a Game of Chess Against a Grandmaster
description_success: The team's unorthodox strategy completely baffles the grandmaster, leading to an unexpected checkmate.
description_failure: The grandmaster checkmates them in four moves. Four times in a row.

name: Perform a Ritual to Summon a Demon
description_success: The ritual works perfectly, and the summoned demon is bound to answer their questions, revealing a great secret.
description_failure: They mispronounce one of the words and accidentally summon a very angry, very large chicken.

name: A Very, Very High Wall
description_success: A team member with incredible agility and speed simply runs up the wall, dropping a rope for the others.
description_failure: The wall is too high to climb without specialized gear.

name: Receive a Hero's Welcome
description: The team arrives in a town that was expecting them, and a grand feast is held in their honor.

name: A Sudden Change of Heart
description: A key NPC that was helping the team suddenly has a change of heart and begins to actively sabotage them.

name: Deliver a Pizza in a War Zone
description_success: Dodging explosions and gunfire, the team delivers the pizza while it's still hot, earning a massive tip.
description_failure: The pizza is vaporized by a laser beam.

name: Fight Your Way Out of a Time Paradox
description_success: The team finds the source of the paradox and corrects it, restoring the timeline and being rewarded by the Time Patrol.
description_failure: They make the paradox worse and are erased from existence... for a little while.

name: A Door That Only Opens If You're a Good Person
description_success: The door senses the pure heart of a healer on the team and swings open.
description_failure: The door remains firmly shut. It silently judges them.

name: Find a Legendary Cookbook
description: The team finds a cookbook filled with recipes that grant powerful, temporary buffs.

name: An Unending Bureaucratic Loop
description: To get Permit A, you need Form B. To get Form B, you need Stamp C. To get Stamp C, you need Permit A.

name: A Dance-Off
description_success: The team's slick moves and perfect rhythm win them the dance competition.
description_failure: They have two left feet and trip over themselves constantly.

name: Survive a Slapstick Comedy Routine
description_success: The team endures falling anvils, banana peels, and pies to the face, emerging with only minor bruises.
description_failure: They slip on a banana peel and fall into a conveniently placed open manhole.

name: A Door Sealed by Science
description_success: A scientifically-minded team member solves the complex physics equation that serves as the lock.
description_failure: The math is too hard.

name: Find a Universal Translator
description: The team finds a device that lets them understand any language, making all social checks easier.

name: Lead-Lined Walls
description: The area is shielded, preventing any psychic or precognitive abilities from working.

name: Win a Game of Go
description_success: The team's patient and far-sighted strategy secures a victory.
description_failure: They are completely outplayed and lose by a wide margin.

name: Fight Off a Horde of Zombies
description_success: The team finds a defensible position and holds off the horde until sunrise.
description_failure: They are overwhelmed by the sheer number of zombies and are forced to flee.

name: A Lock That Requires Immense Power
description_success: A member with overwhelming strength simply smashes the lock to pieces.
description_failure: The lock is made of an unbreakable alloy.

name: Discover a Hidden Library
description: The team finds a library full of ancient knowledge, boosting their intelligence for the rest of the journey.

name: A Case of Mistaken Identity
description: The local authorities mistake the team for a notorious group of bandits, and they spend the rest of the journey being chased.

name: Participate in a School Cultural Festival
description_success: The team's booth is a massive success, and they win the award for 'Best in Show'.
description_failure: Their booth is in the worst location and no one visits. They don't sell a single thing.

name: Survive a 'Friendly' Game of Dodgeball with Demons
description_success: The team's incredible agility allows them to dodge flaming dodgeballs and secure victory.
description_failure: Getting hit by a flaming dodgeball hurts just as much as you'd think.

name: A Path Blocked by Cute Animals
description_success: A character with a natural affinity for animals coaxes them out of the way with gentle words.
description_failure: The animals are too cute to disturb. The team decides to wait, losing a lot of time.

name: Find a Suit of Invisibility Cloaks
description: The team finds a set of cloaks that make them invisible to the naked eye, perfect for sneaking.

name: A Sudden, Blinding Fog
description: A thick, unnatural fog rolls in, making navigation by sight impossible.

name: Win a Chili Cook-Off
description_success: The secret ingredient was love (and a little bit of ghost pepper). The team's chili is a fiery success.
description_failure: The chili is so bland that one of the judges falls asleep while tasting it.

name: Escape a Collapsing Ruin
description_success: The team sprints through crumbling corridors and leaps over chasms, escaping just as the entrance caves in.
description_failure: A falling pillar blocks the exit, forcing the team to find another, much longer way out.

name: A Door That Only Opens for the Absolutely Normal
description_success: A perfectly average, unremarkable team member approaches and the door opens, bored by their normalcy.
description_failure: The team's combined eccentricity is too much for the door to handle. It remains shut.

name: Find a Map of Weak Points
description: The team finds a journal detailing the weaknesses of all local monsters.

name: A Sudden Downpour of Fish
description: It's raining fish. It's slippery, smelly, and very distracting.

name: Survive a Board Game Night
description_success: The team's shrewd tactics and diplomacy lead them to victory in a 6-hour game of 'Settlers of Catan'.
description_failure: An argument over the rules devolves into chaos, and the board gets flipped.

name: Steal a Dragon's Egg
description_success: While the mother dragon is distracted, the team successfully snatches a priceless egg from the nest.
description_failure: The mother dragon spots them instantly and they are forced to flee empty-handed.

name: A Door That Only Opens to a Bad Joke
description_success: A member known for their terrible puns tells a real groaner, and the door opens with a sigh.
description_failure: The team's jokes are too clever and well-crafted for this door's simple tastes.

name: Receive a Divine Intervention
description: Just as things look bleak, a guiding light appears, making the path ahead clear and safe.

name: A Moral Dilemma
description: The team is faced with a difficult choice that causes a rift between members, lowering their morale.

name: A High-Stakes Auction
description_success: The team successfully bids on and wins a valuable artifact, outsmarting the other bidders.
description_failure: They get caught up in a bidding war and end up spending all their money on a worthless trinket.

name: Escape the Belly of a Giant Whale
description_success: By building a raft and starting a large, smoky fire, the team gets the whale to sneeze them out.
description_failure: They wander around in the dark for hours before the whale finally spits them out on its own.

name: A Challenge for a True Hero
description_success: A hero with a strong sense of justice is deemed worthy and granted a legendary weapon.
description_failure: The challenge proves too great for the morally ambiguous team.

name: Find a Cloak of Elemental Resistance
description: The team finds a magical cloak that protects them from harsh magical environments.

name: A Sudden Onset of clumsiness
description: Everyone on the team suddenly becomes incredibly clumsy, tripping over their own feet.

name: A Game of Hide-and-Seek
description_success: The team finds the perfect, most unexpected hiding spot and wins the game.
description_failure: They are found immediately after hiding behind a very small bush.

name: Host a Talk Show
description_success: The team's witty banter and engaging interviews are a hit with the audience.
description_failure: They run out of things to talk about after five minutes of awkward silence.

name: The Door of Laziness
description_success: A character who avoids work at all costs knows the secret to convincing the door to open itself.
description_failure: The door is offended by the team's work ethic.

name: Find a Bag of Holding
description: The team finds a magical bag that can carry an infinite amount of items, ensuring they can carry all future loot.

name: A Plague of Locusts
description: A biblical swarm of locusts descends, consuming all of the team's food supplies.

name: Translate an Ancient Tome
description_success: A studious member of the team translates the tome, revealing a powerful new spell or secret.
description_failure: The language is long dead, and the text is nothing but gibberish to them.

name: Face a Corrupted A.I.
description_success: The team finds a logical paradox that causes the A.I. to short-circuit, allowing them to access its core.
description_failure: The A.I. outsmarts them at every turn, using the facility's systems to trap and eject them.

name: The Path of the Innocent
description_success: A character with a pure, innocent heart walks the path, and the illusions and traps part for them.
description_failure: The path rejects the team, sensing their worldly cynicism.

name: Find a Map of Ley Lines
description: The team discovers a map of magical ley lines, allowing them to enhance their magical abilities for the rest of the journey.

name: A Sudden Betrayal
description: One of the team's own (temporarily) succumbs to greed and tries to steal the loot, causing chaos.

name: Win a Rock-Paper-Scissors Tournament
description_success: Through an uncanny ability to read their opponents, the team wins the entire tournament.
description_failure: They keep choosing rock. It never works.

name: Navigate a City During a Parade
description_success: The team expertly navigates the massive crowds and even manages to catch some free candy.
description_failure: They get swept up in the parade and end up miles from their destination.

name: The Path of the Musician
description_success: A musician on the team plays a flawless tune that resonates with the environment, revealing a hidden reward.
description_failure: Their off-key notes seem to anger the local wildlife.

name: A Moment of Perfect Clarity
description: The team has a breakthrough and understands each other perfectly, allowing for flawless teamwork.

name: An Unstable Portal
description: The team is pulled through a series of random, chaotic portals, leaving them disoriented and far from their original path.

name: Build a Snow Fort
description_success: The team constructs an impenetrable fortress of snow, winning the neighborhood snowball fight.
description_failure: Their fort collapses as soon as the first snowball hits it.

name: Defuse a Magical Bomb
description_success: By carefully disarming the magical runes in the correct sequence, the team prevents a catastrophe.
description_failure: They cut the wrong glowing wire. The resulting explosion is fortunately non-lethal, but very messy.

name: The Wall of Sarcasm
description_success: A character with a sharp, sarcastic wit trades barbs with the wall until it begrudgingly lets them pass.
description_failure: The team's earnest pleas are met with dry, cutting remarks from the wall.

name: Find a Pair of Seven-League Boots
description: The team finds magical boots that let them cover vast distances with each step.

name: A Bad Rumor Spreads
description: A false rumor about the team spreads like wildfire, making all social interactions more difficult.

name: A High-Stakes Tea Ceremony
description_success: The team performs the ceremony with such grace and perfection that the noble host is moved and offers them a valuable gift.
description_failure: They accidentally use salt instead of sugar, and the host is not amused.

name: Face the God of Procrastination
description_success: The team decides to just get it over with, which so surprises the god that it concedes.
description_failure: The team decides to fight it tomorrow. Then the next day. The expedition never finishes.

name: Survive a Tsundere's Lunch Box Gift
description_success: The team bravely eats the slightly burnt, misshapen, but clearly lovingly made lunch.
description_failure: They comment on the octopus wiener's 'interesting' shape and are met with a furious blush and a flying textbook.

name: Navigate a Library of Living Books
description_success: The team soothes the ancient, chattering tomes with quiet reverence, and the books show them a secret way.
description_failure: A loud sneeze causes a cascade of angry, flying books to chase them out of the library.

name: The Gate of Ultimate Sloth
description_success: A character who has truly mastered the art of doing nothing is allowed to pass, as the gate respects their commitment.
description_failure: The gate detects a faint trace of ambition and seals itself shut.

name: A Sudden Burst of Inspiration
description: The beautiful scenery inspires the team, making all creative challenges feel effortless.

name: A Sudden and Inexplicable Musical Number
description: The entire world breaks into a synchronized song and dance. It's confusing and wastes a lot of time.

name: Win a School Trivia Contest
description_success: The team's broad knowledge base allows them to dominate every category.
description_failure: They get stuck on the question 'What is the capital of France?'.

name: A Race Through Crowded City Streets
description_success: The team expertly parkours over obstacles and weaves through traffic to reach the finish line first.
description_failure: They get stuck behind a garbage truck and lose the race.

name: A Door That Only Opens for a True Friend
description_success: The door recognizes the unbreakable bond of friendship within the team and opens.
description_failure: The door senses the simmering romantic tension and gets confused, staying shut.

name: Find an Invisibility Cloak
description: The team finds a cloak that renders them completely invisible, making all stealth-based challenges trivial.

name: A Sudden Case of Chuunibyou
description: One of the team members awakens their 'Dark Flame Master' persona, making all social interactions incredibly embarrassing.

name: Calm Down a Raging Spirit
description_success: The team performs a successful exorcism, pacifying the spirit and finding the treasure it was guarding.
description_failure: Their attempts only anger the spirit further, and they are chased out of the building.

name: Survive a Final Exam Cram Session
description_success: Fueled by coffee and willpower, the team pulls an all-nighter and is fully prepared for the exam.
description_failure: They all fall asleep on their textbooks.

name: The Goddess's Trial of Compassion
description_success: The team shows mercy to a defeated foe, proving their worth to the goddess who rewards them.
description_failure: The team's ruthless efficiency fails the goddess's test.

name: Find a Legendary Sword
description: The team pulls a glowing sword from a stone. Its power makes all combat encounters easier.

name: A Sudden Betrayal from a Trusted Ally
description: An NPC guide they trusted leads them into an ambush, and they must fight their way out.

name: Win a Go-Kart Race
description_success: The team drifts perfectly around every corner and boosts to a first-place finish.
description_failure: They spin out on a banana peel on the final lap.

name: Confront the Great Old One
description_success: The team manages to maintain their sanity long enough to find the artifact and escape.
description_failure: The sight of the creature drives them temporarily mad, and they flee in a gibbering panic.

name: A Door That Only Opens for a True Delinquent
description_success: A character with a rebellious streak kicks the door open, showing it who's boss.
description_failure: The team's polite knocking is completely ignored.

name: Find a Lucky Rabbit's Foot
description: The team finds a (hopefully fake) rabbit's foot, which seems to improve their luck.

name: A Sudden Change in the Law
description: A new, bizarre law is passed overnight, making the team's planned route illegal.

name: A High-Stakes Game of Old Maid
description_success: The team successfully tricks their opponent into taking the Old Maid card.
description_failure: They get stuck with the Old Maid. Again.

name: Navigate a Asteroid Belt Pirate Base
description_success: The team silently navigates the pirate base, looting their storerooms without being detected.
description_failure: They trip a laser wire and have to fight their way past angry space pirates.

name: The Bridge of Truth
description_success: A team member with an honest and pure heart is able to cross the bridge without it crumbling.
description_failure: The bridge detects a small white lie from years ago and refuses to let them pass.

name: Discover a Hidden Oasis
description: The team finds a lush oasis, a perfect place to rest and recover their strength.

name: A Sudden Sandstorm
description: A massive sandstorm kicks up, forcing the team to seek shelter and wait it out, losing valuable time.

name: Win a Sumo Wrestling Match
description_success: With a powerful charge, the team pushes their massive opponent out of the ring.
description_failure: They bounce harmlessly off the opponent's stomach.

name: A Fashion Showdown
description_success: The team's bold and stylish outfits wow the judges and the crowd.
description_failure: Their outfits are declared a 'fashion crime' and they are asked to leave.

name: A Door That Only Opens to True Love's Kiss
description_success: Two members of the team share a heartfelt (and totally platonic, of course) moment, and the door opens.
description_failure: The door remains shut, sensing the team's professional-only relationship.

name: Gain a Familiar
description: The team befriends a small, magical creature that can scout ahead and warn them of danger.

name: A Rival Team Steals Your Map
description: A rival team ambushes them and steals their map, leaving them to navigate by instinct alone.

name: A Game of Chicken with Asteroids
description_success: The team flies directly at the asteroid, firing their thrusters at the last second to narrowly avoid it, impressing the space pirates.
description_failure: They swerve way too early, earning the scorn of the onlookers.

name: Convince a Dragon to Give You a Ride
description_success: The team successfully negotiates with the dragon, who agrees to fly them to their destination... for a price.
description_failure: The dragon considers eating them before deciding they're too scrawny and flies away.

name: The Door of Brotherly Love
description_success: A character with a... complicated family dynamic understands the door's password.
description_failure: The team's healthy, normal sibling relationships mean nothing to this door.

name: Find a Cache of Energy Drinks
description: The team discovers a forgotten vending machine stocked full of highly caffeinated energy drinks.

name: A Sudden Tax Audit
description: The Royal Tax Agency appears out of nowhere and demands to see the team's paperwork. This takes a while.

name: A Test of Courage
description_success: The team stands firm in the face of a terrifying apparition, which dissipates when it sees it cannot scare them.
description_failure: They scream and run in the opposite direction.

name: An Escort Mission
description_success: The team successfully protects the VIP from several assassination attempts and gets them to their destination safely.
description_failure: The VIP wanders off and gets lost while the team isn't looking.

name: A Door That Only Opens to the Wealthy
description_success: A character from a rich family knows the secret knock.
description_failure: The door has a sign that says 'No Peasants Allowed'.

name: Find a Perfect Disguise Kit
description: The team finds a professional disguise kit, allowing them to blend in perfectly in any social situation.

name: A Sudden Bout of Stage Fright
description: Right before a major performance, the team is overcome with anxiety.

name: Defuse a Ticking Time Bomb
description_success: Cut the blue wire! No, the red one! They make the right choice just in time.
description_failure: They cut the wrong wire. Fortunately, it was just a very loud alarm clock.

name: Face the Final Boss of the Universe
description_success: With the power of friendship and a little bit of plot armor, the team defeats the ultimate evil.
description_failure: The final boss's second form was unexpectedly powerful.

name: A Heated Debate Club Match
description_success: The team's flawless logic and rhetoric leave their opponents speechless.
description_failure: They resort to ad hominem attacks and are promptly disqualified.

name: Navigate a Field of Geysers
description_success: By timing their movements perfectly, the team crosses the geyser field without getting soaked.
description_failure: A poorly timed geyser erupts, launching the team's supplies into the air.

name: A Locked Door Requiring a Maid's Touch
description_success: A character with housekeeping expertise finds a hidden switch while dusting.
description_failure: The team's clumsy attempts to clean the area only make it dirtier.

name: Find a Legendary Whetstone
description: The team discovers a mythical whetstone that can sharpen any blade to an impossibly keen edge.

name: A Sudden and Severe Allergy Attack
description: The local pollen is unexpectedly potent, leaving the team sneezing and wheezing.

name: A High-Stakes Game of Sugoroku
description_success: Incredible dice rolls and a bit of luck carry the team to victory.
description_failure: They keep landing on the 'Go Back to Start' space.

name: Infiltrate a Rival School's Festival
description_success: The team blends in with the enemy students and gathers information about their secret project.
description_failure: Their disguises are terrible and they are immediately identified and chased off campus.

name: The Gate of Infinite Possibilities
description_success: A character who can perceive all outcomes chooses the one true path forward.
description_failure: The sheer number of choices paralyzes the team with indecision.

name: Receive a Hero's Cape
description: A grateful villager bestows a magnificent cape upon the team, which seems to bolster their defenses.

name: A Sudden Loss of Funding
description: The team's financial backer pulls out, leaving them to fund the rest of the expedition themselves.

name: A Photography Contest
description_success: The team captures a stunning, once-in-a-lifetime shot that wins the grand prize.
description_failure: They forget to take the lens cap off.

name: Survive a Magical Girl's Rampage
description_success: The team manages to talk down the rampaging magical girl, helping her find peace.
description_failure: The magical girl's despair is too great, and the team is caught in the destructive blast of her grief.

name: A Door That Only Opens for a True Otaku
description_success: A character with deep knowledge of otaku culture answers the door's three obscure trivia questions correctly.
description_failure: The team has never even heard of 'Magical Girl Pretty Sammy'.

name: A Shot of Liquid Courage
description: The team shares a drink (non-alcoholic, of course!) that bolsters their spirits for the road ahead.

name: A Sudden Attack of Shyness
description: The entire team becomes incredibly shy and unable to speak to strangers.

name: A High-Speed Boat Chase
description_success: The team expertly pilots their speedboat through tight turns and big waves to catch the smugglers.
description_failure: Their engine stalls and the smugglers get away.

name: Win the Nobel Prize
description_success: The team's groundbreaking discovery changes the world, and they are honored with the highest award.
description_failure: There was a typo in their research paper, invalidating the entire thing.

name: The Riddle of the Sphinx-Cat
description_success: A cat lover on the team correctly answers that the answer is 'the laser pointer'.
description_failure: The answer was not 'man'.

name: Find a Bag of Endless Snacks
description: The team discovers a magical bag that produces an endless supply of delicious snacks, keeping their energy high.

name: A Sudden Change of Genre
description: The world suddenly shifts from a high fantasy adventure to a gritty noir detective story. The team is very confused.

name: An Archery Competition
description_success: The team hits a bullseye with every arrow, winning the competition easily.
description_failure: They accidentally shoot the judge's hat.

name: Navigate the Maze of the Minotaur
description_success: The team outsmarts the Minotaur and finds their way to the center of the labyrinth.
description_failure: They take a wrong turn and end up back at the entrance.

name: A Door That Only Opens for Those Who Believe
description_success: A character with unshakable faith touches the door and it dissolves into light.
description_failure: The team's cynicism is a palpable force that keeps the door sealed.

name: Find a Pair of Goggles of True Sight
description: The team finds magical goggles that allow them to see through all illusions and find hidden clues.

name: A Sudden Downpour of... Money?
description: It starts raining money. The team spends so much time trying to collect it all that they get hopelessly behind schedule.

name: A High-Stakes Game of Karuta
description_success: The team's lightning-fast reflexes and knowledge of poetry secure them a decisive victory.
description_failure: They are too slow and can't find a single card.

name: Survive the Apocalypse
description_success: Against all odds, the team survives the end of the world and finds a rare artifact in the ashes.
description_failure: The world ends. The expedition is, unsurprisingly, a failure.

name: A Test of Sibling Bonds
description_success: A team with siblings knows the secret to working together to solve the puzzle.
description_failure: The team's bickering proves they are not worthy.

name: A Heroic Reputation Precedes Them
description: The team arrives in a town where they are already famous heroes, and everyone is eager to help them.

name: A Sudden and Irrational Fear of Ducks
description: The entire team is suddenly overcome with an intense, debilitating fear of ducks. There is a pond nearby.

name: A Ballroom Dance Competition
description_success: The team's elegant and perfectly synchronized waltz earns a perfect score from the judges.
description_failure: They step on each other's feet and crash into the dessert table.

name: Infiltrate a Rival Corporation's HQ
description_success: The team successfully navigates the corporate maze, steals the prototype, and escapes through the air vents.
description_failure: They get lost in the cubicle farm and are caught by security.

name: The Door of the Gamer
description_success: A true gamer on the team knows the Konami code is the key.
description_failure: The team tries to brute force the door, which is ineffective.

name: Find a Legendary Strategist's Guidebook
description: The team finds a book of ancient strategies, making all intellectual challenges much easier.

name: A Sudden Wild Magic Surge
description: An unstable magical field causes all spells and abilities to have random, unpredictable effects.

name: A Race Against a Train
description_success: The team sprints through the city and makes it to the station just as the train pulls in.
description_failure: They miss the train by seconds.

name: A Battle of Wits with a God of Knowledge
description_success: The team asks a philosophical question so profound that it stumps the god, who rewards their wisdom.
description_failure: The god answers every question before they can even finish asking, then grows bored and leaves.

name: The Entire Floor is Lava
description_success: The team expertly navigates the room by jumping on furniture, not once touching the molten carpet.
description_failure: Someone's shoe melts. The expedition is a bust.

name: Forced Anime Beach Episode
description: Reality itself seems to bend, forcing the team into a mandatory, non-negotiable beach episode. It's fun, but a huge waste of time.

name: Find a Wallet Labeled 'Plot Armor'
description: The team finds a wallet containing a single card that reads 'Get Out of One Mishap Free'.

name: An Argument with Your Own Shadow
description_success: The team wins the philosophical debate against their own shadow, achieving a new level of self-understanding.
description_failure: The shadow makes some really good points, and now the team is having an existential crisis.

name: The Door is a Tsundere
description_success: The team ignores the door completely, which makes it feel lonely and it opens on its own, demanding they notice it.
description_failure: The team is too nice to the door. It gets flustered and refuses to open. B-baka!

name: Character Development Arc
description: One of the team members is forced to confront their traumatic past. The team makes no progress but grows as people.

name: A Duel of Toasters
description_success: The team perfectly calibrates their toaster to achieve the legendary Golden-Brown Toast, winning the duel.
description_failure: They burn the toast. The shame is unbearable.

name: The Narrator Takes a Liking to You
description: The disembodied voice narrating the expedition decides the team is its favorite and subtly alters reality to help them.

name: A Literal Plot Hole
description_success: The team carefully navigates around the gaping hole in the fabric of reality.
description_failure: They fall into the plot hole and emerge in the next encounter, confused and having lost some items.

name: Sudden Genre Shift to a High School Romance
description: The perilous dungeon transforms into a high school hallway. All combat encounters are replaced with awkward love confessions.

name: Survive a Powerpoint Presentation
description_success: The team manages to stay awake through the entire quarterly budget meeting.
description_failure: The drone of the presenter's voice is a powerful soporific. The team wakes up hours later.

name: A Wall of Text
description_success: A character used to reading dense light novels finds the hidden clue within the wall of text.
description_failure: TL;DR. The team skips the text and misses the clue.

name: A Fight Where Everyone's Power Level is Over 9000
description_success: The team screams for three episodes, their hair changes color, and they somehow win.
description_failure: Their power level was only 8999. A tragic defeat.

name: The Writer Ran Out of Ideas for Setbacks
description: Due to a sudden bout of writer's block, the universe decides that nothing bad can happen for a while.

name: A Sudden and Unexplained Tournament Arc
description: The expedition is suddenly interrupted by a tournament arc. The team must now fight their way through several extra encounters.

name: A Staring Contest with a Basilisk
description_success: The team cleverly uses a mirror to defeat the basilisk without looking at it directly.
description_failure: Someone blinked. Now they have a lovely new statue for the garden.

name: The Door is an Idol Fan
description_success: An idol on the team performs a perfect wink and the door opens, starstruck.
description_failure: The door is not impressed with their performance.

name: Escape a Time-Looping Day
description_success: After thousands of loops, the team finally figures out the one correct sequence of actions to break the cycle.
description_failure: They resign themselves to their fate and spend the rest of eternity reliving a Tuesday.

name: A Deus Ex Machina
description: Just as all hope seems lost, a completely new, never-before-seen character appears and solves the current problem for them.

name: The Animation Budget Runs Out
description: The world suddenly becomes poorly animated. Characters move with 3 frames per second, making all physical tasks nearly impossible.

name: A Game of Calvinball
description_success: The team makes up better rules than their opponents and wins the nonsensical game.
description_failure: You can't win Calvinball. The best you can do is not lose too badly.

name: The Door is a Cat
description_success: The team ignores the door, and then it decides it wants attention and opens.
description_failure: The team pays too much attention to the door, so it decides it wants to be left alone.

name: Survive Being the Main Character for a Day
description_success: The team successfully navigates multiple love confessions, a tournament arc, and a confrontation with their rival.
description_failure: The pressure is too much. They retreat back to being background characters.

name: The Author Remembers a Forgotten Subplot
description: A character suddenly remembers a magical artifact they were given 50 encounters ago and forgot about. It's very useful.

name: The Expedition Becomes a Filler Arc
description: The main plot is put on hold for a series of low-stakes, meaningless encounters.

name: A Legal Battle with a Copyright Troll
description_success: The team's flawless legal arguments win them the case, and they are awarded damages.
description_failure: They are buried in legal paperwork and have to settle out of court.

name: A Wall of Unending Despair
description_success: A character who has known true despair is unfazed and simply walks through the wall.
description_failure: The overwhelming sadness is too much for the cheerful team to bear.

name: Survive a Conversation with an Eldritch God
description_success: The team manages to hold a polite conversation without losing their minds, and the god gives them a parting gift.
description_failure: Their minds shatter into a million pieces. They get better after a while.

name: The Laws of Physics Take a Short Break
description: Gravity becomes optional for a while, allowing the team to bypass a major obstacle.

name: A Sudden De-Powering Event
description: A strange cosmic ray temporarily nullifies all of the team's special abilities and powers.

name: A Battle of Wits with a Trickster God
description_success: The team sees through the god's riddles and tricks, beating it at its own game.
description_failure: The god tricks them into trading all their loot for a single, shiny bean.

name: A Door That Only Opens for Idiots
description_success: A character with a famously low intellect tries to push the pull door and it magically opens.
description_failure: The team is too smart to figure out the door's stupid logic.

name: Navigate a Bureaucracy of Gods
description_success: The team successfully files their petition in triplicate across all seven divine realms.
description_failure: They are sent to the back of the line for using the wrong color ink.

name: The Expedition is a Dream
description: The team realizes they're in a dream, allowing them to bend the rules to their will.

name: Forced Flashback Sequence
description: The expedition is paused while the team relives a key childhood memory that explains their motivation.

name: Survive a Slime Infestation
description_success: The team finds the slime's weakness (salt?) and successfully clears the area.
description_failure: There is so, so much slime. Everywhere.

name: A Door that Feeds on Embarrassment
description_success: A character known for their lack of shame does something incredibly embarrassing, and the door opens, satisfied.
description_failure: The team is too dignified to appease the door's strange appetite.

name: A Kaiju Poetry Slam
description_success: The team's haiku about urban destruction is so moving that the giant monster sheds a single, car-sized tear and leaves.
description_failure: The kaiju does not appreciate their limerick and smashes the building.

name: Find a Fourth-Wall-Breaking Script
description: The team finds a script for their own expedition, allowing them to know what's coming next.

name: The Animation Studio Changes Hands
description: The world's art style suddenly changes drastically, and everyone's character models are different. It's very disorienting.

name: A Philosophical Debate with a Rock
