description_success: The rock makes some compelling points, but the team's counter-arguments are more solid.
description_failure: The rock's stoic silence proves to be an unbeatable debate tactic.

name: The Door of Maximum Effort
description_success: A character known for their passionate, over-the-top personality gives it their all and smashes the door down.
description_failure: The team's calm and measured approach has no effect.

name: Escape from a Living Painting
description_success: The team finds a patch of unfinished canvas and rips their way back to reality.
description_failure: They become part of the painting's beautiful, but static, landscape.

name: The Author Writes You Out of a Corner
description: Just as the team is trapped, a previously unnoticed door appears in the wall.

name: The Episode is a Clip Show
description: The team spends the entire day reminiscing about past encounters instead of having new ones.

name: A Battle of Wits against a Sentient AI
description_success: The team poses a logical paradox that causes the AI to enter an infinite loop, allowing them to bypass it.
description_failure: The AI calculates 10 million moves ahead and checkmates them before they even begin.

name: Overcharge a Mana Crystal
description_success: The team carefully channels their energy, causing the crystal to glow with immense, stable power.
description_failure: Too much power! The crystal cracks, releasing a harmless but disappointing puff of smoke.

name: Win a Test of Strength
description_success: The team shatters the previous record on the high-striker game, winning the grand prize.
description_failure: The hammer bounces off the bell with a sad 'dink' noise.

name: Weave a Complex Illusion
description_success: The illusion is so convincing that the guards let them pass without a second thought.
description_failure: The illusion flickers and dies at the worst possible moment, revealing the team.

name: Clear a Rockslide
description_success: With a coordinated effort, the team clears the heavy boulders blocking the path.
description_failure: The rocks are too heavy to move, forcing the team to find a long way around.

name: Counter a Hostile Spell
description_success: The team erects a powerful magical barrier, deflecting the enemy sorcerer's spell back at them.
description_failure: The enemy's spell is overwhelming, shattering their defenses and forcing a retreat.

name: Win a Tug-of-War
description_success: The team digs in their heels and pulls the opposing team right into the mud pit.
description_failure: The team is dragged unceremoniously through the mud.

name: A Game of Russian Roulette (with Water Guns)
description_success: The team manages to avoid the single loaded water gun, winning the bet.
description_failure: They get a face full of water on the first try.

name: Endure a Marathon of Terrible Stand-up
description_success: The team withstands the onslaught of bad puns and awkward jokes without cracking.
description_failure: They start groaning audibly and are asked to leave.

name: Light Signal Fires
description_success: The team uses a simple fire spell to light a series of signal fires across the mountain peaks.
description_failure: The spell fizzles, and they have to resort to rubbing two sticks together, which takes forever.

name: Break Down a Barricaded Door
description_success: A single, powerful shoulder charge splinters the door and clears the way.
description_failure: The door is reinforced. They just end up with a sore shoulder.

name: Commune with an Elemental Spirit
description_success: The team's magical resonance allows them to speak with the elemental, gaining its trust and a valuable secret.
description_failure: The elemental finds them boring and ignores them.

name: Win a Jousting Tournament
description_success: With a steady hand and a powerful impact, the team unhorses their opponent to the roar of the crowd.
description_failure: They are knocked off their horse in the first pass.

name: Guess the Number of Jellybeans
description_success: Their wild guess is inexplicably the exact correct number, winning them the entire jar.
description_failure: Their guess isn't even close.

name: Survive a Spicy Curry Challenge
description_success: The team endures the inferno-level spice and finishes the entire plate, earning the respect of the chef.
description_failure: They tap out after one bite, desperately chugging milk.

name: Animate a Golem
description_success: The team successfully imbues the stone figure with life, gaining a powerful, temporary ally.
description_failure: The golem twitches one arm, then crumbles into a pile of dust.

name: Chop Firewood for an Entire Village
description_success: The team's tireless chopping provides enough firewood for the village to last the winter.
description_failure: They get a splinter and decide to take a long break.

name: Resist a Siren's Song
description_success: With immense willpower, the team plugs their ears and sails past the alluring but deadly song.
description_failure: The song is too beautiful, and they steer their ship directly into the rocks.

name: A Footrace Against a Centaur
description_success: Using clever shortcuts and a burst of speed at the end, the team narrowly wins the race.
description_failure: It's a person versus a horse. The outcome was predictable.

name: Enchant a Set of Armor
description_success: The enchantment is a success, and the armor now glows with a faint, protective light.
description_failure: The enchantment backfires, making the armor incredibly itchy.

name: Bend Prison Bars
description_success: With a mighty heave, the team bends the iron bars far enough to squeeze through.
description_failure: The bars don't even budge.

name: Read an Opponent's Mind
description_success: The team subtly probes their opponent's mind during a negotiation, learning their bottom line.
description_failure: They try to read their opponent's mind and just get a catchy pop song stuck in their head.

name: Win a Bar Brawl
description_success: The team expertly uses chairs, bottles, and fists to be the last ones standing.
description_failure: They get a chair broken over their back and decide to call it a night.

name: A Game of Russian Roulette
description_success: The team's incredible luck sees them through several rounds, and their opponent loses their nerve.
description_failure: *click* ... The team wisely decides never to do this again.

name: Withstand a Dragon's Roar
description_success: The team plants their feet and endures the deafening, concussive roar of the ancient dragon.
description_failure: The force of the roar sends the team flying backwards.

name: Summon a Familiar
description_success: A cute, helpful magical creature appears in a puff of smoke, ready to assist the team.
description_failure: They summon a deeply unimpressed frog.

name: Stop a Runaway Train
description_success: With a feat of superhuman strength, a team member manages to brace against the tracks and bring the train to a halt.
description_failure: The train continues on its merry way. The team is left in a cloud of dust.

name: Negotiate with a Demon
description_success: The team's magical prowess impresses the demon, who agrees to their terms without a fight.
description_failure: The demon is unimpressed and demands a much higher price.

name: Punch a Shark
description_success: The team asserts their dominance over the local marine life.
description_failure: The shark is not amused and swims away, taking some of their supplies with it.

name: Resist Peer Pressure
description_success: The team stands firm in their convictions, earning the respect of their classmates.
description_failure: They give in and end up with a terrible new haircut.

name: Catch a Greased Piglet
description_success: After a chaotic chase, the team finally corners and catches the slippery piglet.
description_failure: The piglet is too fast and too greasy. It disappears into the woods.

name: Create a Magical Light Source
description_success: A bright, steady magical light illuminates the dark cave, revealing a hidden path.
description_failure: The spell creates a few sad-looking sparks before fizzling out.

name: Win a Log Toss Competition
description_success: The team hurls the massive log end over end, setting a new festival record.
description_failure: They drop the log on their foot.

name: Unravel a Gordian Knot of Magic
description_success: Instead of cutting the knot, the team's magical sensitivity allows them to find the single thread that unravels it all.
description_failure: The knot is too complex, and their attempts to untangle it only make it tighter.

name: Defeat a Rival Dojo
description_success: The team defeats every student and the master of the rival dojo, proving their style is superior.
description_failure: The rival dojo's secret technique is too powerful, and the team is soundly defeated.

name: Survive a Series of Rube Goldberg Machine Accidents
description_success: Through sheer, dumb luck, the team manages to avoid every falling piano, swinging paint can, and rogue bowling ball.
description_failure: They get hit by a rake.

name: Endure a Monologue from the Final Boss
description_success: The team patiently listens to the entire tragic backstory and waits for the boss to reveal their weak point.
description_failure: They interrupt the monologue and are immediately hit with a powerful counter-attack.

name: A Magical Card Game Duel
description_success: The team draws the one card that can turn the duel around, winning the match.
description_failure: They activate their opponent's trap card.

name: Hold the Line Against an Orc Horde
description_success: The team forms a shield wall and successfully holds the narrow pass until reinforcements arrive.
description_failure: The sheer weight of the horde breaks their formation.

name: Calm a Storm with Magic
description_success: The team works together to perform a ritual that calms the raging thunderstorm.
description_failure: Their spell backfires, and now the rain is slightly purple.

name: Anvil Tossing Competition
description_success: The team hurls the anvil an impressive distance, winning the competition.
description_failure: They drop the anvil on their own foot. It hurts.

name: Navigate a Minefield... Blindfolded
description_success: By some miracle, the team walks through the entire minefield without a single misstep.
description_failure: *click*

name: Tank a Meteor
description_success: The team braces and somehow survives a direct impact from a falling meteor.
description_failure: It's a meteor. They are wisely not standing there when it lands.

name: A Duel of Wits with a Fey Trickster
description_success: The team beats the fey at its own game of riddles and wordplay, earning a powerful boon.
description_failure: They are tricked into trading their names for a handful of pretty pebbles.

name: Arm Wrestle a Giant
description_success: With surprising technique and brute force, the team manages to slam the giant's hand down.
description_failure: The giant barely notices they're trying.

name: Resist the Urge to Pet a Very Dangerous Creature
description_success: Despite how fluffy it looks, the team successfully resists the urge to pet the obviously deadly monster.
description_failure: It was not friendly. They have several new bites to show for it.

name: A Rooftop Chase
description_success: The team leaps from rooftop to rooftop, expertly cornering their target.
description_failure: They misjudge a jump and end up in a dumpster.

name: Disenchant a Cursed Object
description_success: The team successfully removes the dark magic from the object, revealing its true, valuable form.
description_failure: The curse transfers to one of the team members, who now hiccups bubbles.

name: Win a Demolition Competition
description_success: The team demolishes the condemned building in record time, earning a bonus from the construction company.
description_failure: They accidentally demolish the building next to the correct one.

name: Light a Path with Will-o'-Wisps
description_success: The team convinces the mischievous spirits to light their way through the darkest part of the swamp.
description_failure: The wisps lead them directly into a mud pit for their own amusement.

name: Win a Sword Fight against a Rival
description_success: The team's superior swordsmanship disarms their rival, earning a point for their class.
description_failure: Their rival's signature move is too fast, and they are honorably defeated.

name: Power a Ghostly Ship
description_success: By pouring their magical energy into the ship's phantom engine, the team is granted passage across the cursed sea.
description_failure: The ship's engine sputters and dies, leaving them stranded on a haunted shore.

name: Find a Needle in a Haystack
description_success: Against all probability, a team member trips and lands face-first on the needle.
description_failure: It's a haystack. They find hay.

name: Endure a Full-Body Massage from a Giant
description_success: While intensely painful, the massage somehow works out all their knots. They feel strangely durable.
description_failure: They tap out immediately. The giant's 'gentle pressure' feels like being hit by a truck.

name: Carve a New Path Through a Jungle
description_success: The team hacks through the dense vegetation, creating a new, direct route to their destination.
description_failure: Their machete is no match for the magically-enhanced vines.

name: Perform a Rain Dance
description_success: The team's heartfelt ritual summons a refreshing downpour, replenishing their water supplies.
description_failure: The sky remains stubbornly clear, and their dancing just makes them hotter.

name: Defeat a Dojo Master
description_success: In a climactic battle, the team finds an opening and defeats the legendary master.
description_failure: The master defeats them with a single, lightning-fast strike.

name: Win the Lottery
description_success: The team buys a lottery ticket on a whim and hits the jackpot!
description_failure: They were one number off.

name: A Long and Boring Filibuster
description_success: The team endures the hours-long, mind-numbing speech without falling asleep.
description_failure: They fall asleep and are fined for contempt of parliament.

name: A Magical Duel of Wits
description_success: The team uses clever, low-power spells in unexpected ways to outsmart their powerful but unimaginative opponent.
description_failure: Their opponent counters every spell with a bigger, flashier spell.

name: Ring the Bell at the Top of a Tower
description_success: After climbing thousands of steps, the team summons their last reserves of strength to ring the colossal bell.
description_failure: They reach the top, but are too exhausted to even lift the bell's hammer.

name: Navigate an Unstable Wormhole
description_success: By sheer chance, the wormhole deposits them exactly where they wanted to go.
description_failure: The wormhole deposits them in a dimension made entirely of cheese. It's pleasant, but not helpful.

name: Survive a Concert Front Row
description_success: The team endures the crushing crowd and deafening speakers, and even catches a guitar pick.
description_failure: The mosh pit proves too intense, and they are ejected into the back.

name: Create a Potion of Luck
description_success: The delicate brewing process is a success, creating a potent, shimmering potion of good fortune.
description_failure: They add one too many newt eyes, and the potion turns a disappointing shade of beige.

name: Punching a Hole in Reality
description_success: With a punch that breaks the laws of physics, the team creates a shortcut to their destination.
description_failure: Reality punches back. It is surprisingly painful.

name: A Magical Girl's Entrance Exam
description_success: The team demonstrates a perfect understanding of friendship, rainbows, and overwhelming firepower.
description_failure: Their transformation pose is deemed 'uninspired' and they fail.

name: Survive a Game Show
description_success: The team luckily avoids the trap doors, slime pits, and foam mallets to win the grand prize.
description_failure: They are immediately eliminated after slipping on a banana peel.

name: Walk Across a Bed of Hot Coals
description_success: With incredible fortitude, the team walks across the coals without flinching.
description_failure: Ouch! Hot! The team decides to go around.

name: A Bar Fight with Gods
description_success: The team manages to hold their own against the divine brawlers, earning their drunken respect.
description_failure: Getting hit by the God of Thunder's fist is a humbling experience.

name: Summon a Meteor
description_success: The team pools their power and calls down a massive meteor, obliterating the obstacle in their path.
description_failure: They summon a small, harmless pebble. The enemy is not impressed.

name: Guess the Password to a Speakeasy
description_success: The team's first guess, 'password', is inexplicably correct.
description_failure: They try every password they can think of, but none are right. The bouncer is getting annoyed.

name: Endure an Idol's Scolding
description_success: The team withstands the surprisingly harsh (but still cute) scolding.
description_failure: Their spirits are crushed by the cute disappointment.

name: An Arm-Wrestling Match with a Demon
description_success: The team's combined strength overpowers the demon, who begrudgingly grants them passage.
description_failure: The demon wins without even trying.

name: Light the Way with a Firefly Swarm
description_success: The team uses a gentle charm to convince a swarm of fireflies to illuminate their path.
description_failure: The fireflies are not in the mood and fly away.

name: A Debate on the Nature of Moe
description_success: The team presents a compelling, multi-faceted argument that earns the respect of their peers.
description_failure: Their definition of 'moe' is declared heretical and they are shunned.

name: Deliver Tofu Down a Treacherous Mountain Pass
description_success: The team drifts perfectly through every hairpin turn, delivering the tofu without spilling a drop.
description_failure: They take a turn too fast and the tofu ends up all over the windshield.

name: A Test of Strength from a Martial Arts Master
description_success: The master is impressed by the team's raw power and teaches them a new technique.
description_failure: The master deflects their attack with a single finger.

name: A Magical Game of Tag
description_success: The team uses teleportation and illusion spells to remain untaggable.
description_failure: Their opponent uses a homing spell. It is not very fair.

name: Navigate a Field of Banana Peels
description_success: The team miraculously manages to walk through the entire area without slipping once.
description_failure: A comical series of slips and falls ensues.

name: Endure Being Used as a Training Dummy
description_success: The team withstands the barrage of attacks, impressing the drill sergeant with their toughness.
description_failure: They are left bruised, battered, and demoralized.

name: Win a Home Run Derby
description_success: The team hits a series of towering home runs, winning the derby.
description_failure: They strike out looking.

name: A Tarot Card Reading
description_success: The team draws 'The Sun', predicting a fortunate outcome and finding a hidden purse of gold.
description_failure: They draw 'The Tower'. A bird immediately poops on their head.

name: A Duel with a Rival Swordsman
description_success: In a flurry of sparks, the team disarms their rival.
description_failure: The rival's speed is too much, and the team is defeated.

name: A Game of Rock-Paper-Scissors for the Fate of the World
description_success: Good ol' rock. Nothing beats that. The team wins.
description_failure: They chose paper, but their opponent chose a universe-destroying pair of scissors.

name: Survive a Comedy Roast
description_success: The team takes the harsh jokes in stride, and even gets a few good roasts in themselves.
description_failure: Their feelings are hurt. They spend the next hour crying in the bathroom.

name: Weave a Tapestry of Fate
description_success: The team weaves a thread of victory into the cosmic tapestry, ensuring their success.
description_failure: They get the threads tangled, resulting in a chaotic and unpredictable future.

name: Slay a Hydra
description_success: By cauterizing the necks as they cut them, the team finally defeats the multi-headed beast.
description_failure: They cut off one head, and two more grow in its place. This isn't working.

name: A Diplomatic Dinner with Cannibals
description_success: The team manages to stay off the menu through sheer force of personality and polite conversation.
description_failure: They accidentally call the main course 'unappetizing'.

name: A Motorcycle Chase Through Neo-Tokyo
description_success: The team executes a perfect power slide to corner their target in a dead-end alley.
description_failure: They crash into a noodle stand.

name: Perform a Counter-Curse
description_success: The team successfully reflects the hex back at the enemy caster.
description_failure: The curse is too strong, and now everyone on the team has bad luck for a while.

name: Destroy an Asteroid
description_success: With one, impossibly powerful punch, the team shatters the asteroid threatening the planet.
description_failure: Their punch just leaves a small, fist-sized crater in the asteroid.

name: Charge a Spirit Bomb
description_success: The team gathers energy from all living things on the planet to create an unstoppable attack.
description_failure: The local squirrels refused to share their energy.

name: Survive a Rube Goldberg Machine of Death
description_success: A series of fortunate coincidences allows the team to survive the absurdly complex death trap.
description_failure: They are ultimately defeated by a rogue bowling ball.

name: A Philosophical Debate with a Black Hole
description_success: The team endures the crushing existential weight of the black hole's arguments and emerges with a new understanding of reality.
description_failure: The black hole's logic is inescapable, and the team is consumed by nihilism.

name: Defeat Your Evil Twin
description_success: The team proves that the original is always better, defeating their goateed doppelgangers.
description_failure: The evil twins have cooler moves and better one-liners.

name: A Magical Girl Transformation Contest
description_success: The team's transformation sequence has the most sparkles, lens flare, and background music, earning them a perfect 10.
description_failure: They trip during their final pose.

name: Outrun a Tsunami
description_success: The team sprints for high ground, staying just ahead of the massive wave.
description_failure: The wave is much faster than it looks. The team is soaked, and their supplies are washed away.

name: Meditate to Find Inner Peace
description_success: The team successfully clears their minds, achieving a state of perfect calm and finding a hidden spiritual artifact.
description_failure: They can't stop thinking about what's for dinner.

name: Endure a Rock Concert by an Elder God
description_success: The team withstands the sanity-blasting guitar riffs and somehow finds the rhythm, earning the god's respect.
description_failure: Their ears bleed, and their minds unravel.

name: Win a Game of 'Guess Which Cup Has the Poison'
description_success: With a confident smile, they choose a cup. Their opponent laughs, revealing all the cups were poisoned... except the one they chose.
description_failure: They chose... poorly.

name: Punching a Ghost
description_success: They punch with such conviction that it somehow connects with the ectoplasmic entity, dispersing it.
description_failure: Their fist goes right through. The ghost is very amused.

name: Create a Pocket Dimension
description_success: The team successfully weaves space and time to create a small, stable dimension to rest and store their loot.
description_failure: They create a dimension full of angry wasps. They quickly close the portal.

name: A Race Against a Bullet Train
description_success: Running along the rooftops and taking shortcuts, the team actually manages to beat the train to the next station.
description_failure: It is a bullet train. They are not faster than a bullet train.

name: A Battle of Wits against a Fox Spirit
description_success: The team sees through the kitsune's riddles and flattery, impressing the ancient spirit.
description_failure: The kitsune tricks them into trading their shoes for 'magic beans'.

name: Survive a Direct Hit from a Cannonball
description_success: It hurts. A lot. But they are still standing, much to the enemy's shock.
description_failure: The team is sent flying into a conveniently placed haystack.

name: Survive a Death Flag
description_success: A character says 'We'll be home soon, I have a letter for my sweetheart.' and somehow, miraculously, nothing bad happens.
description_failure: A character says 'What could possibly go wrong?' and everything immediately goes wrong.

name: Win a Food Fight
description_success: The team's perfect aim and powerful throws dominate the cafeteria.
description_failure: They are immediately taken out by a well-aimed bowl of mashed potatoes.

name: Perform a Weather-Controlling Ritual
description_success: The team successfully changes the weather to clear skies, making their journey much easier.
description_failure: The ritual backfires, creating a small, highly localized tornado right on top of them.

name: Deliver a Message Across a Battlefield
description_success: Ducking and weaving through the chaos of battle, the team delivers the critical message just in time.
description_failure: They get pinned down by enemy fire and fail to deliver the message.

name: Give a Motivational Speech
description_success: The team's inspiring words rally the downtrodden townspeople, who offer them supplies in gratitude.
description_failure: Their speech is full of clichés and falls completely flat.

name: Endure a Giga-Drill Break
description_success: Their fighting spirit allows them to withstand the impossibly epic attack.
description_failure: Their drill is not the drill that will pierce the heavens.

name: Win a Game of Mahjong Against a God of Luck
description_success: By some cosmic fluke, the team achieves a Thirteen Orphans hand on the first draw.
description_failure: The God of Luck draws a winning hand every single time. It wasn't even a challenge.

name: Split a Mountain in Half
description_success: With a single, earth-shattering blow, the team cleaves the mountain in two, revealing a path.
description_failure: They succeed only in creating a very loud noise and a lot of dust.

name: A Magical Girl Transformation Sequence... in Public
description_success: The public is dazzled by the light show and assumes it's a marketing stunt, tossing money at them.
description_failure: Everyone just stares awkwardly until it's over.

name: Catch a Roadrunner
description_success: This time, the ridiculously elaborate trap actually works!
description_failure: Meep meep.

name: Resist the Cuteness of a Thousand Kittens
description_success: With a heart of stone, the team manages to push past the adorable kittens to reach their goal.
description_failure: They are overwhelmed by cuteness and spend the rest of the day playing with kittens.

name: Survive a Fall from Orbit
description_success: The team uses debris as a makeshift heat shield and somehow survives re-entry.
description_failure: The team becomes a beautiful, short-lived shooting star.

name: Find the One Ring in a Volcano
description_success: Just as they're about to give up, a team member trips and their hand lands directly on the ring.
description_failure: It's a volcano full of lava. They find lava.

name: Defeat a Rival with the Power of Friendship
description_success: The team's combined attack, fueled by their unbreakable bond, overpowers their rival.
description_failure: Their rival points out that friendship isn't a quantifiable source of energy.

name: Re-ignite a Dying Star
description_success: The team pours all of their magical energy into the star's core, causing it to flare back to life.
description_failure: Their magic is like a single candle in a hurricane. It has no effect.

name: Win a Cross-Country Race on Foot
description_success: The team's endurance and speed are unmatched, and they cross the finish line days ahead of the competition.
description_failure: They get a cramp in the first mile.

name: Conduct a Seance
description_success: The team successfully contacts the spirit world and gets the information they need.
description_failure: They contact a very grumpy ghost who just complains about the price of ectoplasm.

name: Survive Being Stepped On by a Giant Robot
description_success: The team braces for impact and somehow survives being crushed, leaving a perfect footprint-shaped hole around them.
description_failure: They are squashed. (They get better.)

name: A Game of Charades for the Universe
description_success: Their surprisingly good miming of 'The Inevitable Heat Death of the Universe' wins the game.
description_failure: No one can guess their obscure movie reference.

name: Punching Out Cthulhu
description_success: The team punches the great old one so hard it decides to go back to sleep for another thousand years.
description_failure: Their fists are no match for non-Euclidean geometry.

name: Rewrite a Law of Physics
description_success: With a deep understanding of arcane and scientific principles, the team temporarily rewrites gravity to solve a puzzle.
description_failure: They accidentally delete the concept of friction and everything starts sliding around uncontrollably.

name: A Race Through the Internet
description_success: The team digitizes themselves and surfs the data streams to reach their destination in picoseconds.
description_failure: They get stuck behind a massive cat video that's hogging all the bandwidth.

name: A Staring Contest with a God
description_success: The team's unblinking resolve unnerves the deity, who concedes the match.
description_failure: The god has no eyelids. It was an unwinnable fight from the start.

name: Survive a Hug from a Giant
description_success: The team withstands the bone-crushing hug and the giant is pleased to have made new friends.
description_failure: Their ribs creak ominously, and they have to politely ask to be put down.

name: Survive a Slapstick Opening Sequence
description_success: The team manages to avoid all the toast-in-mouth collisions and late-for-school shenanigans.
description_failure: They turn a corner and run directly into their love interest, causing a comical misunderstanding.

name: A Carpentry Competition
description_success: The team builds a beautiful, sturdy cabinet in record time.
description_failure: The instructions were in Swedish. They end up with a pile of spare parts and a crooked shelf.

name: Perform a Concert Using Only Magic
description_success: The team creates instruments out of pure light and sound, putting on a legendary performance.
description_failure: Their magical tuba is horribly out of tune.

name: A Parkour Race Through Venice
description_success: The team leaps between gondolas and rooftops, winning the race.
description_failure: They fall into a canal. It is very wet.

name: A Group Therapy Session
description_success: The team opens up about their feelings and has a major emotional breakthrough.
description_failure: No one wants to share, and they spend an hour in awkward silence.

name: Survive a Direct Hit from a Spirit Bomb
description_success: The team's pure heart allows them to withstand and even deflect the massive energy attack.
description_failure: They are not pure of heart.

name: Win a Game of Chance against Death
description_success: They bet it all on a single coin flip. It lands on its edge.
description_failure: Death always wins in the end.

name: Win a Competitive Eating Contest
description_success: The team devours an impossible amount of food, earning the title of champion.
description_failure: They get full after the first course.

name: A Magical Girl Makeover Session
description_success: The team's sense of style and magical flair create a stunning new look.
description_failure: Too many sparkles. Way, way too many sparkles.

name: A Race on the Rainbow Road
description_success: The team masterfully drifts around the star-filled corners and avoids falling off the edge.
description_failure: They fall off the edge. Repeatedly.

name: Teach a Class of Unruly Children
description_success: The team's patience and kindness win over the children, who listen attentively.
description_failure: The children form a small army and overthrow the team.

name: Survive a Full Season of an Anime
description_success: The team endures all the filler, flashbacks, and tragic backstories to see the finale.
description_failure: They get written out of the show in the second episode.

name: A Game of Russian Roulette with a Magical Gun
description_success: The gun clicks empty. The chambered spell was 'Create a Bouquet of Flowers'.
description_failure: The chambered spell was 'Summon a Very Angry Bear'.
